req.title: Card PIN change
req.statement: A customer shall change their card PIN at most 5 times per 24-hour window.
preconditions: card belongs to caller

doc.reasoning: R-FIN-022 mandates rate-limiting on card PIN changes: maximum 5 changes per 24-hour window. Test suite validates: (1) successful PIN change within limit (positive/EP), (2) rejection on 6th attempt within window (negative/NEG), (3) boundary transitions at exactly 5 changes (boundary/BVA), and (4) state behavior across time windows (STC). Tests use deterministic mocking of time and API responses to ensure idempotence and repeatability.

tests.name: test_pin_change_within_limit_succeeds
preconditions: Customer authenticated with valid session token
Card ID exists and belongs to caller
Customer has made 0 PIN changes in the last 24 hours
New PIN is valid format (4-6 digits)
expected: Card PIN is updated in backend
trace: Equivalence partition: valid request within rate limit

tests.name: test_pin_change_exceeds_rate_limit_rejected
preconditions: Customer authenticated with valid session token
Card ID exists and belongs to caller
Customer has made exactly 5 PIN changes in the last 24 hours
New PIN is valid format
expected: Response status is 429 Too Many Requests
Response body contains error code RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED
PIN is NOT updated in backend
trace: R-FIN-022: error pathway - 429 when rate limit exceeded
Negative test: exceeding maximum 5 changes per 24-hour window

tests.name: test_pin_change_at_boundary_limit_5th_succeeds
preconditions: Customer authenticated with valid session token
Card ID exists and belongs to caller
Customer has made exactly 4 PIN changes in the last 24 hours
New PIN is valid format
expected: Customer is now at maximum limit (5/5)
trace: R-FIN-022: boundary condition - at most 5 times per 24-hour window

tests.name: test_pin_change_resets_after_24hour_window
preconditions: Customer authenticated with valid session token
Card ID exists and belongs to caller
Customer made 5 PIN changes, last one was 23 hours 59 minutes ago
New PIN is valid format
actions: Wait for window to expire (mocked time advancement)
expected: Customer counter resets to 1 change in new 24-hour window
trace: R-FIN-022: state transition - window expiry resets counter
STC: transition from exhausted (5/5) to available (1/5) after time window

tests.name: test_pin_change_invalid_card_ownership
preconditions: Customer authenticated with valid session token
Card ID does NOT belong to caller
Precondition violated: card belongs to caller
expected: Response body contains error code UNAUTHORIZED_CARD
trace: R-FIN-022: precondition violation - card does not belong to caller
Negative test: unauthorized access to card
